title: Is "automatic logic" inside a "function automatic logic" module supported
body:
Hello,

is "automatic logic" inside a "function automatic logic" module supported ? Calling it like
`
> iverilog -g2012 includes/kmieFunctions.sv
includes/kmieFunctions.sv:25: syntax error
includes/kmieFunctions.sv:25: error: malformed statement
Appended code called with - g2012
`
throws error

This is the code:
     13 package kmieFunctions;
     14 
     15 // CRC functions generated by online tool:
     16 // http://outputlogic.com/?page_id=321
     17 //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
     18 // parallel 4-bit CRC for 20 bits of data
     19 // polynomial: 0x9 (MSB first) 1001
     20     function automatic logic [3:0] crc4_poly9_data20bits
     21         (
     22             input logic [19:0] data_in
     23         );
     24 
     25         automatic logic [3:0] lfsr_q, lfsr_c;
"
